title: SATOSHI
content:
Follow the community as they investigate links and discussions about Satoshi!

I'm gonna use this thread as a repository for interesting things I find about SATOSHI for the SATOSHI.movie project

first example https://x.com/adam3us/status/1855547821539152328

some fun things im noticing. half Finney may have been the first one to coin the term blockchain as block chain. he also brings up source forge as a hosting option for bitcoin's code since bitgold was hosted there too, which satoshi eventually used. the byzantine generals problem doesn't appear until james donald brings it up as a concept for satoshi to address. satoshi also confirms he had a bitcoin testnet of sorts in nov 2008.
line1: Follow the community as they investigate links and discussions about Satoshi!
line2: I'm gonna use this thread as a repository for interesting things I find about SATOSHI for the SATOSHI.movie project first example some fun things im noticing.
